# VYCL

> VYCL LLC is the only consultancy purpose-built for the vehicle subscription economy. Founded by Ryan Yamauchi, VYCL helps dealer groups, lenders, SaaS platforms, and fleet operators launch, finance, and scale subscription programs across the United States—with live operating proof in Hawaii (FlexRide by King, 800+ vehicles subscribed).

VYCL connects lending, inventory, marketing, insurance, technology, and operations through its Six Pillars framework and an ecosystem of partners (KEYVO underwriting, Tomorrow's Journey / JRNY, Axle, PLUG, AVIS/Budget, MiaVita, Westlake Financial, CULA). Engagement models: Advisory, Implementation, and Ongoing Partnership.

- **Canonical site:** https://www.vycl.com
- **Primary contact:** https://www.vycl.com/contact
- **Schedule a call:** https://calendly.com/vycl/30min
- **Entity:** VYCL LLC · Hawaii-based, operating nationally
- **Founder:** Ryan Yamauchi

## FAQs

**What is VYCL?**  
VYCL LLC is a consultancy purpose-built for the vehicle subscription economy. It helps dealer groups, lenders, SaaS platforms, and fleet operators launch, finance, and scale subscription programs—not a subscription software vendor.

**What is vehicle subscription?**  
A mobility model where customers pay recurring fees for access to a vehicle (often including insurance, maintenance, and flexibility terms), distinct from traditional purchase, lease, or short-term rental. VYCL specializes in designing and operating these programs for automotive businesses.

**Who does VYCL serve?**  
Dealer groups (subscription on existing rooftops), lenders (fleet lending and collateral modeling), SaaS platforms (US dealer-network launch and JRNY implementation), and fleet operators (fleet-to-subscriber revenue). See audience pages under Site pages.

**What is the Six Pillars framework?**  
VYCL’s operating model spans six areas: Lending, Inventory Management, Marketing, Insurance, Technology, and Operations. Each pillar maps to named partners and playbooks (e.g., Westlake/CULA for lending, JRNY for technology, Axle for insurance).

**What engagement options does VYCL offer?**  
Three tiers on `/services`: **Advisory** (strategy and feasibility), **Implementation** (hands-on launch across all Six Pillars), and **Ongoing Partnership** (optimization and multi-market scaling).

**What proof does VYCL cite?**  
Published metrics: 800+ vehicles subscribed in Hawaii, 45 days from idea to live program (FlexRide by King), and 10+ years of subscription-first experience led by founder Ryan Yamauchi.

**What is FlexRide by King?**  
Hawaii’s active vehicle subscription program built and operated with VYCL across King Auto Group rooftops (e.g., King Windward Nissan, Infiniti of Honolulu), using JRNY, Axle, and a Westlake/CULA lending facility—operated through NYP, LLC.

**What is KEYVO and how does it relate to VYCL?**  
KEYVO is an underwriting platform for vehicle subscription used by dealers and lenders. Ryan Yamauchi is a co-founder; VYCL clients can access KEYVO for subscriber approval and lender-grade portfolio data.

**Where does VYCL operate?**  
Hawaii-based with national reach across the United States; active proof in Hawaii with programs and partnerships expanding nationally.

**How do I contact VYCL or schedule a call?**  
Use the form at https://www.vycl.com/contact or book https://calendly.com/vycl/30min. The site also offers a newsletter signup on the homepage footer.

## Site pages

- [Home](https://www.vycl.com/): Hero, proof stats (800+ vehicles, 45-day launch, 10+ years), Why VYCL, Who We Serve, partner ecosystem, Six Pillars, FlexRide case study, founder, testimonials, contact
- [About](https://www.vycl.com/about): Company overview and Ryan Yamauchi founder bio
- [Services](https://www.vycl.com/services): Three engagement tiers—Advisory, Implementation, Ongoing Partnership
- [Programs](https://www.vycl.com/programs): Active subscription programs including FlexRide by King
- [Contact](https://www.vycl.com/contact): Lead form and Calendly scheduling
- [Dealer Groups](https://www.vycl.com/dealer-groups): Subscription on rooftops without ops rebuild; KEYVO, JRNY, Axle
- [Lenders](https://www.vycl.com/lenders): Fleet lending, collateral modeling, KEYVO underwriting, Westlake/CULA
- [SaaS Platforms](https://www.vycl.com/platforms): US market entry and exclusive Tomorrow's Journey / JRNY licensing
- [Fleet Operators](https://www.vycl.com/fleet-operators): Fleet-to-subscriber programs; PLUG, AVIS/Budget inventory

## Six Pillars

- [Lending](https://www.vycl.com/#pillars): Westlake Financial and CULA facilities; lender-ready portfolio structure
- [Inventory Management](https://www.vycl.com/#pillars): AVIS/Budget wholesale and PLUG pre-owned EV sourcing
- [Marketing](https://www.vycl.com/#pillars): Subscription-specific acquisition via MiaVita Solutions
- [Insurance](https://www.vycl.com/#pillars): Axle-powered verification across subscribers and rooftops
- [Technology](https://www.vycl.com/#pillars): Exclusive US licensing partner for Tomorrow's Journey JRNY platform
- [Operations](https://www.vycl.com/#pillars): Workflows, staffing, and multi-rooftop program design
